Overview

Pipefy and Relay.app are two of the most talked-about solutions in the software space. Whether you are a small business owner, a growing startup, or an established enterprise, picking the right tool can significantly impact your workflow and results. Let us break down how these two platforms compare across the metrics that matter most.

Feature Analysis

Both Pipefy and Relay.app share a solid foundation of core features including Visual Builder, Api Connections, Scheduling, Conditional Logic. Interestingly, both platforms offer nearly identical feature sets. The difference lies more in the implementation quality and depth of each feature rather than feature availability itself. Looking at user ratings, Pipefy holds an overall score of 7/10 and an ease of use score of 7/10, while Relay.app scores 7/10 overall and 8/10 for ease of use. These ratings reflect real user experiences and can indicate differences in usability, support quality, and overall satisfaction.

Pricing Breakdown

When it comes to pricing, both Pipefy and Relay.app offer flexible pricing models. Both platforms offer free plans, which is great for testing before committing. Pipefy's free tier and Relay.app's free tier each have their own limitations, so it is worth evaluating both to see which free offering better matches your initial needs.

Pros & Cons

Pipefy

  • Excellent pipe/kanban workflow model
  • Good free tier for small teams
  • Strong templates for common processes

Cons

  • -Can feel rigid for complex workflows
  • -Limited customization on lower plans
  • -Reporting needs improvement

Relay.app

  • Unique human-in-the-loop approach
  • Clean and modern interface
  • Good AI action support

Cons

  • -Relatively new with smaller ecosystem
  • -Limited advanced features
  • -Fewer integrations than established tools

Who Should Choose Which?

The ideal user for each platform differs considerably. Pipefy is best suited for HR teams, procurement, service management, making it a strong choice if you fall into any of these categories. Relay.app, meanwhile, shines for teams needing approval flows, operations, customer success, which means it may be the better pick if your needs align with those use cases. Founded in 2014, Pipefy describes itself as "AI-enhanced business process automation with customizable workflows." Relay.app, established in 2021, positions itself as "Automation platform with human-in-the-loop approval workflows." With 7 years between them, Pipefy brings the maturity and proven track record of a veteran platform, while Relay.app offers the fresh perspective and modern architecture of a newer entrant.

Our Verdict

After analyzing all the data, **Pipefy** comes out slightly ahead in this comparison, thanks to availability of a free plan. However, this does not mean Relay.app is a poor choice — far from it. Relay.app excels in its own right, particularly for teams needing approval flows and operations. Our recommendation: if you value excellent pipe/kanban workflow model, go with Pipefy. If unique human-in-the-loop approach matters more to you, Relay.app is the way to go. Either way, both are solid platforms that have earned their place in the market.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Pipefy better than Relay.app?
It depends on your needs. Pipefy scores 7.0 overall while Relay.app scores 7.0. Pipefy is best for HR teams and procurement, while Relay.app excels for teams needing approval flows and operations.
Which is cheaper, Pipefy or Relay.app?
Pipefy starts at Free and Relay.app starts at Free. Pipefy offers a free plan. Relay.app offers a free plan. Overall value depends on which features you need.
Can I switch from Pipefy to Relay.app?
Yes, most users can migrate between these platforms. Both Pipefy and Relay.app support data import/export. The migration process typically involves exporting your data from one platform and importing it into the other. Some tools also offer migration assistance to make the transition smoother.
What do users say about Pipefy vs Relay.app?
On review platforms, Pipefy holds an overall rating of 7/10 and an ease of use score of 7/10. Relay.app has an overall rating of 7/10 and ease of use score of 8/10. Users praise Pipefy for excellent pipe/kanban workflow model and Relay.app for unique human-in-the-loop approach.
Which should I choose in 2026, Pipefy or Relay.app?
In 2026, we recommend Pipefy for most users based on its overall score and feature set. However, Relay.app remains a strong contender, especially if you prioritize unique human-in-the-loop approach. Try both free trials before committing.
